label: Dashboard
subtitle: Chat with your AI medical assistant and generate structured anamneses in one place.
startFirstChat: Start your first chat to see it here.
howDesc: Chat with the AI about your symptoms, then generate a structured anamnesis whenever you need one.
step1: Start a new chat from the sidebar.
step2: Describe your symptoms in plain language.
step3: Generate an anamnesis — the AI extracts it for you.
